positive: A clean, stylized illustration of a crescent moon nestled within a cluster of oversized, detailed botanicals like glowing ferns and delicate jasmine flowers. The scene should have a strong silhouette aesthetic with highly saturated, ethereal colors—deep indigo, luminous turquoise, and soft pearlescent gold accents. Focus on clean lines, negative space, and geometric arrangement, suitable for a single, impactful repeating pattern or a centered apparel print. Minimalist background gradient. Vector art style, high contrast, magical realism, centered composition.
negative: photorealistic, complex shading, blur, noise, grainy, amateur, watermark, logo, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, dirty, ugly, signature
